name: Feature request

---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Why this matters

Who benefits, and how?

## Proposed direction

Describe the approach you have in mind, if you have one.

## Constraints or tradeoffs

List any known constraints, risks, or alternatives.

## Additional context

Add links, examples, or prior art if helpful.
